Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 21,2002
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Deborah Neville. Plaintiff represented by counsels, Edwin Zinman, Esq. and James Davis, Esa. Ilene Goldberg, Esq. appeared for Defendant, Dr.Chan and Mike Kowalski, Esq. appeared for Defendant Dr. Lee. Court receives evidence and good cause appearing grants judgment as follows: Settlement: $950,000.00; $150,000.00 to plaintiff's Husband, Tommy Bergeron; $800,000.00 to Plaintiff deducting Costs: $26,529.36; Fees: $187,670.60; Special trust City & County of San Francisco; $143,604.19; Medicare lien trust $12,000.00 for a net balance of $430,195.85 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Marine Branch. Counsel to prepare judgment for Court's signature.
